author.bio: #IPFS Core Dev, creator David DM http://david-dm.org, co-creator & organiser @NodeBotsUK & @MeteorLondon meetups. Owner TABLEFLIP https://tableflip.io
author.name: Alan Shaw

content.text: Today is treat day! 🍩 go-ipfs 0.4.23 is out now, and fixes some critical bugs. Read all about it: https://ipfs.io/blog/2020-01-30-go-ipfs-0-4-23/ The results have been, incredible! #ipfs #dweb #bugfixes #panics #security
